name: cubica-monorepo
description: Workspace root for Cubica SDK packages, games and supporting apps.

scripts.verify:runtime-api: npm run typecheck --workspace services/runtime-api && npm test --workspace services/runtime-api && npm run smoke --workspace services/runtime-api
scripts.verify:player-web: npm run typecheck --workspace @cubica/player-web && npm run build --workspace @cubica/player-web
scripts.verify:canonical: npm run verify:runtime-api && npm run verify:player-web
